trivia_bullets.text: Battle for Zendikar (BFZ, released 2015-10-02) introduced Devoid as the mechanical signature of Eldrazi drones — cards printed in colored frames that contain no color in their mana identity. Nettle Drone is a 3/1 Eldrazi Drone costing {2}{R} that prints red but is actually colorless per the Devoid rule. [Scryfall API]

Nettle Drone's untap-on-colorless-spell clause made it the engine of a documented Pauper infinite-damage combo: pairing it with Banishing Knack or Retraction Helix and a free colorless artifact (e.g., Ornithopter or Welding Jar) creates a loop where the Drone untaps each cast, allowing unlimited Tap activations dealing 1 damage to each opponent. The combo appears in documented Pauper decklists as 'Nettle-drazi Combo.' [tappedout.net: "4 Infinite Combos with Nettle Drone"; deckstats.net: "Nettle-drazi Combo" via WebSearch]
sources: tappedout.net: 4 Infinite Combos with Nettle Drone (WebSearch snippet)

trivia_bullets.text: Pauper-legal and paupercommander-legal (Scryfall legalities). The card has no flavor text. EDHREC rank 11,642 — the highest EDHREC rank among the BFZ Eldrazi common-drone cycle, reflecting its combo-enabling utility compared to simple beatsticks. [Scryfall]

Illustrated by Clint Cearley, who has painted multiple Eldrazi drone cards across BFZ and Oath of the Gatewatch — his spiny, radially-symmetric style is visually consistent with the Eldrazi drone aesthetic across the block. [Scryfall]

related_cards.name: Vestige of Emrakul
related_cards.note: Sister BFZ Eldrazi Drone common in the same collector range; same Devoid block identity

related_cards.name: Eldrazi Skyspawner
related_cards.note: Companion Eldrazi drone that generates colorless tokens — feeds Nettle Drone's untap trigger

related_cards.name: Battered Golem
related_cards.note: Functional parallel — also untaps when an artifact is cast; appears in the same Pauper combo lists

related_cards.name: Ghostfire Blade
related_cards.note: Equipment that gives +2/+1 to colorless creatures; equips to Nettle Drone enabling faster kill in combo or beatdown
